message:
fix(search): correct layer normalization and UTF-8 snippet handling

- tantivy.rs: Fix normalize_layer to map to database values (system,
  global, project, local) instead of incorrectly converting away from them
- search.rs: Fix find_snippet to use character positions instead of byte
  positions, preventing panics on multi-byte UTF-8 content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
